alkylation reagent: alkylated with 10 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min in the dark at 22°C
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 10 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min in the dark at 22°C
cleavage agent: samples were digested with trypsin (Promega, 0.5 μg) overnight at 37°C
instrument: the HPLC system was coupled to a Q Exactive Plus hybrid quadrupole-Orbitrap mass spectrometer
labeling: Tandem mass tag (TMT) mass spectrometry of these polyribosome fractions identified 598 proteins
reduction reagent: the alkylation reaction was quenched by the addition of DTT
reduction concentration: samples were reduced with 5 mM DTT at 56°C for 30 min
